title: Biomantic Delight
description: Integration between Farmer's Delight and Biomancy
body:
This mod adds new items and recipes of meals that can be crafted with items from Biomancy. 
Using the Primary ingredients of Flesh, Bone, Blood, and Bone Marrow, you'll be able to craft various food items.

![Important Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36f14789e3cd1081a4cfe5aeb10e2c51924f1a7a.png)

These 4 base ingredients can be crafted into various foods, bread made from bones, a bagel smeared in blood, a COMPLETELY ORDINARY PROTEIN SHAKE, Pâté, and more. 

This mod serves as an excellent way to use excess flesh and materials from Biomancy.
